description: Legal record (#13) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 6r of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Undated, but likely c. 1560 CE based on the dates in neighboring entries from the court register. Shemuʾel b. Yaʿaqov al-Levi al-[Yeru]shalmī(?) appears before the court and members of the Karaite community in Dār Simḥa Synagogue to make a rental payment for his residence, which is part of the communal qodesh. The payment structure factors in Shemuʾel's maintenance/upkeep costs for the property. In a later entry of the same court register a certain Shemuʾel al-Levi al-Qudsī is listed as one of the residents of qodesh properties (PGPID 41042 ll. 15-16), which could be the same person if his name is indeed Shemuʾel al-Levi al-[Yeru]shalmī(?) (with the scribe alternating between Arabic and Hebrew equivalents al-Qudsī/al-Yerushalmī). MCD.
description_he: רשומה משפטית (#13) בפנקס בית דין קראי בקהיר (דף 6א של ייבר-ערב. I 328). לא מתוארך, כ-1560 לספירה. שמואל בן יעקוב הלוי [הירו]שלמי(?) מופיע בפני בית הדין ובני הקהילה הקראית בבית הכנסת 'דאר שמחה' לשלם שכר דירה על מגוריו, שהם חלק מהקודש הציבורי
